About Us

We Are T Nails and Spa

Come relax and experience the difference at T Nails and Spa. We hold ourselves to a standard of excellence on all our services including our spa pedicures, manicures, waxing, specialist acrylic nails and GelX nails.

We are committed to providing not only the best pedicure service, but also the most SANITARY. Our new Disposable Pedicure Jet-Liners will protect you from cross-contamination and provide you with the most hygienic pedicure experience

Our Special
